name: io.github.LizzleChen/local-dfw-mcp
description: Your AI's DFW guide: Dallas 311, crime, flood zones, schools, utilities, districts. No API keys.

environmentVariables.name: DFW_SODA_APP_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional Socrata app token — raises the shared per-IP rate limit for Dallas open-data queries. Free at https://dev.socrata.com/register. Works fine without it.
